title: Anatomy of a Lactococcal Phage Tail
summary: The paper provides a detailed anatomical description of the Siphoviridae phage Tuc2009, including its isometric head, long noncontractile tail, baseplate, collar, and whisker structures. It compares Tuc2009's morphology to λ and other lactococcal phages, identifying structural proteins and their locations. Other phages are mentioned in comparative genomic or morphological contexts.

Tuc2009.morphology: Siphoviridae, small isometric head, long noncontractile tail, baseplate, collar structure, whisker-like appendages
Tuc2009.virion_diameter_nm: head diameter comparable to λ (mean measurements taken)
Tuc2009.structural_proteins: major head protein (encoded by orf37 and orf39 fusion), major tail protein (MTP_2009, encoded by orf45), portal protein (encoded by orf33), upper baseplate protein (BppU_2009, encoded by orf51), baseplate-associated protein (BppA_2009, encoded by orf52), lower baseplate protein (BppL_2009, encoded by orf53), neck passage structure (NPS_2009, encoded by orf55), tail tape measure protein (TMP_2009, encoded by orf48), distal tail protein (Dit_2009, encoded by orf49), Tal_2009 (encoded by orf50), tail assembly proteins gpG_2009 (encoded by orf46) and gpGT_2009 (encoded by orf46-47 fusion)

extra.tail_structure: tail tube consists of 34 ± 1 disks, central channel visible, knobbly appearance
extra.baseplate_description: single disk with irregular teardrop-like appurtenances (petticoat structure), conical structure under baseplate with protruding fiber
extra.collar_and_whiskers: collar at head-tail junction, two whisker-like appendages protruding from top of collar or bottom of head
extra.protein_localization: MTP_2009 coats entire tail shaft, Dit_2009 at base of tail, Tal_2009 at tail tip, BppU_2009 and BppL_2009 at baseplate, NPS_2009 at top of tail beneath head (collar and whiskers)
extra.comparison_to_λ: striking parity with λ in head diameter, tail length, tail diameter, and number of tail disks

TP901-1.structural_proteins: upper baseplate protein (BppU_TP901-1), lower baseplate protein (BppL_TP901-1), distal tail protein (Dit_TP901-1), Tal_TP901-1, tail tape measure protein (TMP_TP901-1)

extra.baseplate_structure: double disk baseplate comprised of BppU_TP901-1 (upper disk) and BppL_TP901-1 (lower disk) assembled onto conical fiber structure
extra.tail_assembly: TMP_TP901-1, Dit_TP901-1, and Tal_TP901-1 form initiator complex for tail assembly

TP901-1 48⁻.morphology: mutant derivative lacking double baseplate structure

extra.baseplate_absence: lacks double baseplate structure characteristic of wild-type TP901-1
extra.protein_localization: TMP_2009 antibodies recognize structure at base of tail

extra.genomic_classification: member of Sfi11 group of P335 species lactococcal phages
extra.structural_difference: lacks nps_2009 homolog, no collar and whisker structures evident

extra.genomic_classification: temperate phage placed in r1t group of P335 species lactococcal phages
temperate phage placed in r1t group of P335 species lactococcal phages

λ.tail_width_nm: 9 nm in diameter (annular ring), central hole 3 nm in diameter
λ.structural_proteins: major tail protein (gpV), tail assembly proteins gpG and gpGT, tape measure protein (gpH), J tail fiber protein

extra.tail_structure: tail tube comprises 32 disks of gpV hexamers, each an annular ring with central hole and six outer knobs
extra.comparison_to_Tuc2009: striking similarities in head diameter, tail length, tail diameter, and number of tail disks

extra.tail_symmetry: sixfold rotational symmetry noted for contractile tail

extra.genomic_classification: member of proposed Sfi21 group of P335 species lactococcal phages
member of proposed Sfi21 group of P335 species lactococcal phages
member of proposed Sfi21 group of P335 species lactococcal phages
member of proposed Sfi21 group of P335 species lactococcal phages
member of proposed Sfi21 group of P335 species lactococcal phages
